prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024年最低位次约12388名，2025年最低位次约14128名，一年间后移约1740名，降幅约14%，显示该校在上海的录取位次出现明显松动。2021-2023年， 无法完整呈现更长期走势，但2024→2025年的后移趋势清晰，2025年14128名为最新基准；该校在上海市综合科类招生计划2024年为5人，2025年增至8人，2026年 计划仍为8人，与2025年持平。计划未进一步扩招，对位次的稀释效应不再加大，但2025年扩招已对当年位次后移产生了一定影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南师范大学为2 11工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第79名，近年排名稳定在75-80名区间，属于中上层次全国重点师范大学。学校位于广东省广州市，对上海考生而言属于跨 省报考，地域距离因素需纳入考量；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，仅有一条涉及学校管理或回应的记录（与电影争议相关），未出现明显负面舆情。抖音热度 总排名第70位，评价为"一般"，综合热度约43.8万，在师范类院校中处于中等水平，未出现高热关注信号。历史投档异常记录中无华南师范大学相关断档或暴跌事件；心理学获评A+（全国顶尖），马克思主义理论获评A，教育学、体育学获评A-，学科实力突出。心理学作为王牌专业在上海招生（物理必选组），对高分考生有较强吸引力 ，但该专业组2025年最低位次为8579名，与不限组（14128名）差距显著。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业2024年社会热度评估为"分化观望"，整体趋于平稳；心理学属 热门方向。上海市2026年高考考生总数约66700人，较2025年的49276人大幅增加约35.4%，竞争显著加剧。；华南师范大学位于广东省广州市，对上海考生属于跨省就读。该校在上海市招生规模较小（8人），本地考生跨省报考师范类院校时，华东师范 大学（上海本地985师范）为更强替代选择，可能分流部分高分考生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024→2025年位次已明显后移的趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平（无进一步扩招） 、上海市考生总数大幅增加约35.4%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉中性无负面冲击、抖音热度一般等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年14128名基础上继续小幅后移。预测最低位 次约14328名，区间13828-14828名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 心理学（师范类）
- 心理学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 金融学
- 传播学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 哲学
- 传播学（与金融学同组）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间13828-14828名内，建议以二档专业（金融学、传播学）为主攻方向，一档心理学（物理必选组）需位次明显优于区间上限（约8500名以内）方可冲刺；三档哲学 可作为保底选择。注意心理学专业有物理必选要求及色盲色弱限制，报考前需确认选科与身体条件。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 12,388, and in 2025 it was approximately 14,128, a drop of about 1,740 positions over one year, a decrease of about 14%, indicating a clear loosening of admission rankings in Shanghai. From 2021 to 2023, a complete longer-term trend cannot be presented, but the downward trend from 2024 to 2025 is clear, with 14,128 in 2025 as the latest baseline; the enrollment plan for the comprehensive subject category in Shanghai was 5 students in 2024, increased to 8 students in 2025, and the plan for 2026 remains 8 students, unchanged from 2025. The plan has not further expanded, so the dilution effect on rankings will not increase, but the expansion in 2025 has already had some impact on the ranking decline that year.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China Normal University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 79th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 75-80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of national key normal universities. The university is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, which is an out-of-province choice for Shanghai candidates, and the geographical distance factor needs to be considered; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with only one record related to school management or response (related to a film controversy), with no obvious negative public opinion. The Douyin popularity total ranking is 70th, rated as "average," with a comprehensive popularity of about 438,000, at a medium level among normal universities, with no high-attention signals. There are no records of discontinuities or sharp drops related to South China Normal University in historical admission anomalies; Psychology is rated A+ (top in the country), Marxist Theory is rated A, and Education and Physical Education are rated A-, with outstanding disciplinary strength. Psychology, as a flagship major, recruits in Shanghai (physics required group), which strongly attracts high-scoring candidates, but the minimum ranking for this major group in 2025 was 8,579, significantly different from the unrestricted group (14,128).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity assessment for normal/education majors in 2024 is "divergent wait-and-see," with an overall stable trend; psychology is a popular direction. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Shanghai college entrance examination is approximately 66,700, a significant increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, leading to intensified competition. South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong Province, which is an out-of-province study choice for Shanghai candidates. The university has a small enrollment scale in Shanghai (8 students). When local candidates consider out-of-province normal universities, East China Normal University (a local 985 normal university in Shanghai) is a stronger alternative, which may divert some high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear downward trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025, the enrollment plan for 2026 unchanged from 2025 (no further expansion), a significant increase of about 35.4% in the total number of Shanghai candidates leading to intensified competition, neutral school reputation with no negative impact, and average Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to decline slightly from the 2025 baseline of 14,128. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14,328, with a range of 13,828 to 14,828.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Psychology (Normal)
- Psychology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Philosophy
- Communication Studies (same group as Finance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13,828 to 14,828, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Finance, Communication Studies) as the main direction; Tier 1 Psychology (physics required group) requires a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range (approximately within 8,500) to be a reach; Tier 3 Philosophy can be a safe choice. Note that Psychology has a physics requirement and color blindness/weakness restrictions; confirm subject selection and physical conditions before applying.
